lemmas.statement: (n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n ([] : List α) = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : take n ([] : List α) = []
(x : Nat) (y : Nat) (ys : List Nat) : x ≤ y → sorted (y :: ys) → sorted (x :: y :: ys)
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro hxy hsorted
  cases ys with
  | nil =>
    simp [sorted, hxy]
  | cons z zs =>
    simp [sorted] at hsorted ⊢
    exact And.intro hxy hsorted

lemmas.statement: (x y : Nat) : ¬ x ≤ y → y ≤ x
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro h
  exact Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_not_le h)

lemmas.statement: (x z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = x :: z :: zs
(x z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : ¬ x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = z :: insort x zs
(n : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : count n (insort n xs) = Nat.succ (count n xs)
lemmas.proof:
by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [insort, count]
  | cons y ys ih =>
    by_cases hle : n ≤ y
    · simp [insort, if_pos hle, count]
    · simp only [insort, if_neg hle, count]
      rw [ih]; split_ifs <;> omega

lemmas.statement: (n m : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : n ≠ m → count n (insort m xs) = count n xs
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro hnm
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [insort, count, hnm]
  | cons y ys ih =>
    by_cases hle : m ≤ y
    · simp [insort, if_pos hle, count, hnm]
    · simp only [insort, if_neg hle, count]
      rw [ih]

lemmas.statement: (xs : List α) (ys : List α) : drop 0 (xs ++ ys) = xs ++ ys
